name: Football-Data.org API
what_it_does: Freemium REST API providing football/soccer data for major European leagues including standings, fixtures, results, and team statistics.
use_cases: Fetching live and historical match results for European football leagues
Building football standings tables and fixture calendars
Querying team and player statistics for analysis or content generation
Monitoring league competition progress for fantasy football agents
Powering soccer-focused chatbots and automated reporting
not_for: American sports (NFL, NBA, MLB, NHL) — football/soccer only
Real-time sub-second live data — free tier polling has rate limits
Leagues outside the supported European competition list without a paid plan
best_when: Building agents or apps focused on European football leagues that need a reliable, simple REST API with a usable free tier for prototyping and light production use.
avoid_when: You need coverage beyond top European leagues, real-time push data, or odds and betting markets.

auth.notes: API token passed in X-Auth-Token request header. Single token grants access to all endpoints permitted by your tier. Self-service signup with immediate token issuance.

pricing.free_tier_limits: 10 requests/minute; limited to 6 major competitions (Premier League, Bundesliga, etc.)
pricing.paid_tiers: Paid tiers from ~$15/month unlocking additional competitions, higher rate limits, and more endpoint access
pricing.notes: Free tier is genuinely useful for hobbyists and light agents. Paid tiers unlock La Liga detail, all UEFA competitions, and higher throughput.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Returns standard HTTP status codes with JSON error bodies; 429 rate limit errors include a Retry-After header making backoff straightforward
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: All endpoints are read-only; no mutation operations exist
known_agent_gotchas: Free tier 10 req/min limit is easy to hit if an agent fans out parallel queries
Competition IDs are numeric and must be known in advance — no slug-based lookup
Data update frequency varies by competition tier; some lower-tier leagues update slowly
No official SDK means agents must handle HTTP client retry logic themselves

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. Single API token with no scope granularity — one key grants all-or-nothing access to your tier. Token revocation available through dashboard.
